title: Endpoint monitoring agent disconnect notification

rule_origin.reference: external_replication_v1 pre-model alert-anchor review under policy v1.0

scope.description: All events for asset DESKTOP-DS4FBF4 in the corpus-native SIEM partition wazuh-alerts-4.x-2024.12.01; no timestamp or record identifier is used.

rationale: A monitoring-agent disconnect is a direct observability-loss alert without by itself proving deliberate tampering.
